rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER RODRIGUES VS. PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 20, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1st cause of action , Negligence negligent misrepresentation. - Sustain with leave to amend to allege why waiver not applicable. 2nd cause of action, Set aside foreclosure sale. - Sustain with leave to amend to allege (1) foreclosure violations not based on ccc-2923.5; (2) facts showing exemption from tender rule. 3rd cause of action, Cancellation of trustee's Deed - Sustain with leave to amend to allege tender fact showing exemption from tender rule. 4th cause of action, Breach of covenant of good faith - Sustain with leave to amend to allege plaintiff's performance per modification agreement. 5th cause of action, predatory lending; violation of B&P 17200 - Sustain with leave to amend to allege why waiver not applicable. 6th cause of action, Unfair and Deceptive Practices (UDAP) - Sustain with leave to amend to allege why waiver not applicable and right to private cause of action. 7th cause of action, Negligence - Sustain with leave to amend to allege duty of care per Nymark; to allege causation and non-speculative damages. 8th cause of action, Declaratory Relief - Sustain without leave to amend. 9th cause of action, Quiet Title - Sustain with leave to amend to allege tender. 10th cause of action, Accounting - Sustain with leave to amend to alleged that "the accounts are so complicated that an action at law for a sum certain would be impracticable. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion For A Stay Of Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 20, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF and MATT PINNA's Motion For A Stay Of Proceedings. Grant, stay pending DFEH investigation subject to posting rent/bond. =(501/REQ)
